'''Battlegroup ''Orion''''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Battle group/Legends|battle group]] assigned to [[Task Force Vengeance|Task Force ''Vengeance'']]. The Star Destroyers ''[[Nemesis]]'' and [[Conqueror (Imperial-class)|''Conqueror'']] were assigned to this group.

==History==
At a [[skirmish near Almaran]], [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Wooyou Senn|Senn]] ordered Battlegroup ''Orion'' to take up pursuit of the Calamari cruiser [[Liberty/Legends|''Liberty'']], alongside with [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Interdictor]] ''[[Compellor]]''. Eventually, both Star Destroyers were [[Ambush in the Goff system|destroyed]] in the ambush laid by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]] in the [[Goff system/Legends|Goff system]].
